description_long: This is a weathered stone sculpture depicting a robed male figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure holds a crozier or staff in his right hand, suggesting a religious or ecclesiastical role, and his left hand is partially concealed within the folds of his robe. The facial features are detailed, with a prominent beard and a solemn expression. The drapery of the robe is intricately carved, with deep folds and a sense of weight. The surface of the sculpture shows signs of aging, with patches of discoloration and rough texture, likely due to prolonged outdoor exposure.
description: A weathered stone statue of a robed male figure holding a staff, with detailed facial features and draped garments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, crozier in the right hand, and detailed robe folds.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the robe and the profile of the head and staff.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, the figure's posture, and the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, the crozier, and the layered robe.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure holding a staff
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
